Class Client.Builder

main.models.User.Builder<Client.Builder>

main.models.Client.Builder
Enclosing class:
Client
public static class Client.Builder extends RegistrableUser.Builder<Client.Builder>
Builder pattern implementation for cleanly generating Client instances.
